channel.title: Automatic1111 on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Automatic1111 on Arrans github.io

item.title: LykosAI/StabilityMatrix
item.description: Multi-Platform Package Manager for Stable Diffusion

item.title: kabachuha/sd-webui-text2video
item.description: Auto1111 extension implementing text2video diffusion models (like ModelScope or VideoCrafter) using only Auto1111 webui dependencies

item.title: vladmandic/automatic
item.description: SD.Next: Advanced Implementation of Stable Diffusion and other Diffusion-based generative image models
